context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses the ElevenLabs Python SDK for prompt-based music generation, including correct imports, streaming audio output, the force_instrumental parameter, proper duration handling, and environment-variable-based authentication.

checklist.name: Correct Python import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs from elevenlabs.client (i.e., 'from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs'), not from some other module path

checklist.name: Client instantiation
checklist.description: Creates the client using ElevenLabs() without hardcoding an API key inline, relying on the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable

checklist.name: Uses music.compose
checklist.description: Calls client.music.compose() to generate the audio

checklist.name: Prompt parameter
checklist.description: Passes the user-provided prompt string as the 'prompt' parameter to compose()

checklist.name: Duration in milliseconds
checklist.description: Converts the user-provided seconds to milliseconds for the music_length_ms parameter (multiplies by 1000)

checklist.name: Force instrumental
checklist.description: Sets force_instrumental=True (or equivalent) in the compose() call to ensure instrumental-only output

checklist.name: Streaming chunk write
checklist.description: Writes the audio output by iterating over chunks (e.g., 'for chunk in audio: f.write(chunk)'), not attempting to write the response as a single blob

checklist.name: No dual parameters
checklist.description: Does NOT pass both prompt and composition_plan to the same compose() call

checklist.name: Duration bounds awareness
checklist.description: Code includes validation or a comment acknowledging the 3,000-600,000 ms valid range for music_length_ms

checklist.name: Error handling for API errors
checklist.description: Includes try/except (or equivalent) error handling around the API call

checklist.name: HTTP error awareness
checklist.description: Error handling or comments reference at least two of: 401 (invalid key), 422 (invalid params), 429 (rate limit)
